attributes.description: Overview of application (connector) logs in OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise.

params.markdown:
#### OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise

**Application Logs**

This dashboard gives visibility into in-app connector activity in OpenAI ChatGPT Enterprise, showing the requests ChatGPT sends to connected apps and connectors and the responses returned. It highlights total events and unique users, the split between requests and responses, activity by app and app type, the most active apps and users, and the source geography and clients involved. Use the controls above to filter by app, app type, and user to support connector-usage monitoring, auditing, and investigation.

**[Integration Page](/app/integrations/detail/openai_chatgpt_enterprise/overview)**
